page.title: cystic fibrosis — RepurpOS | OpenSourceMedicine
page.description: Structured alterations and therapeutics for cystic fibrosis: molecular targets, clinical biomarkers, phenotypes, and ranked drugs from Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, and DGIdb.
page.hero: Disease intelligence for cystic fibrosis: 176 alterations and 332 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.
